rationale: Gov't Code §1477.303 governs county revenue bond issuance for facilities. It is unrelated to Tax Code §11.13(b) homestead exemption amounts; no overlap or dependency exists.
quote: The commissioners court of the county by order may issue revenue bonds to provide all or part of the money to establish, acquire, construct, improve, enlarge, equip, or repair a facility described by Section 1477.302.
_note: No conflict; rule concerns county revenue bonds, not property tax homestead exemptions.
